flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southeastern Louisiana University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southeastern Louisiana University rose 37% between 2021 and 2024 (19.2% → 26.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southeastern Louisiana University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (37.6% → 45.4%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southeastern Louisiana University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (64.3% → 72.5%).
